# fac_rf_baseline_watch

**NOT A MEDICAL DEVICE.** Facility / clinical engineering RF baseline helper.

Passive multi-band edge counts for approved engineering spaces.
Does not identify protocols. Does not detect "attacks" by itself.
Compare over time with PC history tools (`lab_rf_delta_watch`, survey history).

## Deploy

Copy to `/ext/groklink/skills/fac_rf_baseline_watch/`.

## Policy

- Passive only.
- Get space owner approval before any hospital floor measurement.
- Prefer PC `groklink` multi-band survey with settle delays for dense sweeps.
